hard_stops.logic: project must be initialized before any design review activities begin
design contains unresolved building code violations — cannot advance to next phase
design has ADA accessibility violations — must be resolved before permit submission

soft_flags.logic: value engineering savings target has not been achieved — review VE log for opportunities
one or more design deliverables are past due — schedule impact possible
design deviates more than 5% from approved program — owner review recommended
more than 20 open RFIs — design team response capacity may be strained
